A5.name: wr_breakeven_gap
A5.note: Per-market wr_gap_to_breakeven not computed in this run; using net_pnl proxy.
A5.threshold: >= 2 markets positive AND portfolio wr_gap >= +0.5 pp

A6.name: validator_pass
A6.note: Tier-N spec 16-item validator + s7-specific corr_attestation not invoked at P6.5b.

A8.name: cost_stress_survival
A8.note: Only S1 ran this turn; DR2/DR3/DR5 deferred to a full matrix run.

A9.name: safety_template_C1_C8
A9.note: Derived from safety_diagnostics; full validator deferred.

c1_c8_attestation.C1_LiveMode_refusal: applies; driver has no LiveMode path; status_fields PAUSED + BLOCKED_AT_6_GATES recorded
c1_c8_attestation.C2_provenance_contract: applies; engine-truth window 2013-01-01..2022-12-30 hard-checked at function entry
c1_c8_attestation.C4_rth_execution_discipline: applies; RTH per-market windows enforced (NQ/GC/ZN 09:30-16:00 ET, CL 09:30-14:30 ET)
c1_c8_attestation.C5_event_risk_contract: PARTIAL; roll/expiry blackout NOT enforced in this driver version (continuous-front-month series stitched by Databento absorbs roll). Documented as limitation.
c1_c8_attestation.C6_diagnostic_output_schema: applies; this report IS the C6 emission; sealed via LESSON_HUNTER_004

cost_tiers_deferral_reason: Driver re-decodes all 480 DBN files per cost_tier call. Running 5 tiers sequentially would take ~5x the S1 runtime under the current driver. P6.5b ran only the S1 baseline. Operator may authorize a follow-up P6.5c that adds the remaining tiers.

K10.name: diversification_falsified
K10.note: Requires per-market daily-return covariance; not computed in single-tier S1 run.

K12.name: reject_fast
K12.note: DR2/DR3/DR5 require all 5 cost tiers; only S1 ran this turn. K12 evaluation deferred.

next_step_authorized_by_this_run: operator_decision_required; choose among: (a) AUTHORIZE_P6_5c_FULL_COST_STRESS_MATRIX (run S0/S2/S3/S4 to complete DR2/DR3/DR5 evaluation), (b) AUTHORIZE_P7_IN_SAMPLE_DECISION_MEMO (draft memo from S1 result; cite prior buggy-driver run for context), (c) AUTHORIZE_P8_LIFECYCLE_TRANSITION (park or hold based on K-fires)
